channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Responds to US Peace Proposal as Strait of Hormuz Partially Reopens
item.description: Iran has formally replied to a US proposal aimed at initiating peace talks to end the ongoing conflict, according to Iranian state media. The response, relayed via mediator Pakistan, focused on haltin...

item.title: Shia LaBeouf's Career Earnings and Net Worth in 2026
item.description: Shia LaBeouf, the American actor and filmmaker born on 11 June 1986, is currently worth about $20 million as of 2026. He became famous through his role in the Disney Channel series Even Stevens and la...

item.title: Teduray Mother Balances Family Life and Indigenous Leadership
item.description: In Upi, Maguindanao del Norte, Jennevie 'Jen' Cornelio, a Teduray mother of five, exemplifies the integration of family responsibilities and community leadership. As a council member of the Teduray an...

item.title: Day Six of Antisemitism Royal Commission: Nine Witnesses to Share Experiences
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion continued its hearings in Sydney on 11 May 2026, focusing on understanding and addressing antisemitism in Australia. Day six of the first block...

item.title: Udhayanidhi Stalin Congratulates Vijay as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and Acknowledges New Role as LoP
item.description: In a significant political development in Tamil Nadu, actor-turned-politician C. Joseph Vijay has taken oath as the 13th Chief Minister of the state, marking a historic transition in the region's poli...

item.title: B.C. tribunal resolves noise complaint over band and dance rehearsals
item.description: Residents in a B.C. apartment building had long complained about loud noises from band and dance rehearsals occurring in the building. The sound was reportedly strong enough to shake ceilings and dist...

item.title: Government Agency Asked to Explain Use of Unauthorized Red License Plate
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has issued a show-cause order to an unnamed government agency after a Ford Explorer vehicle allegedly using a fake red license plate went vir...

item.title: Arteta Praises Referees for Correct Decision After Arsenal's Win Over West Ham
item.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta don talk say he dey respect the referees after dem make one bold decision wey affect the result of wetin be tense Premier League match against West Ham United on Sunday. T...

item.title: Jake Hall's Struggles with Addiction and Mental Health End Tragically in Majorca
item.description: Jake Hall, a former star of the reality show The Only Way Is Essex (TOWIE), tragically passed away at the age of 35 in a rented villa in Santa Margalida, Majorca. Friends and his former partner, Misse...

item.title: U.S. Passengers From Cruise Ship Exposed to Hantavirus Return Home Under Monitoring
item.description: Passengers from the cruise ship MV Hondius, where a hantavirus outbreak occurred, began disembarking in Granadilla, Spain on May 10, 2026. A total of 18 passengers headed to the U.S., including 17 Ame...

item.title: Proposed Japanese Manned Space Capsule by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries
item.description: Currently, only a few countries—namely the United States, Russia, China, and soon India—can independently send astronauts into orbit. Notably, Japan and Western Europe have strong manned space program...

item.title: Gontse's Journey from Graduate to Municipal Intern in the Free State
item.description: Gontse, a BSc graduate in hydrology and water resource management from the Central University of Technology, faced significant challenges finding employment after graduating. Hailing from Hertzogville...

item.title: Kentucky GOP Primary Candidate Criticized for Using AI in Campaign Post
item.description: In the Kentucky GOP primary race for the 4th congressional district, incumbent Rep. Thomas Massie criticized his challenger, retired Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein, after Gallrein posted a social media message...

item.title: Caroline Elliott campaigns to unite B.C. Conservatives ahead of leadership vote
item.description: Caroline Elliott is emerging as a leading candidate in the B.C. Conservative leadership race, positioning herself as a pragmatic unifier capable of challenging Premier David Eby's NDP government. She ...

item.title: ABS Survey Shows Decline in Trust and Wellbeing Among Australians
item.description: The latest 2025 General Social Survey from the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) reveals a notable drop in trust, social inclusion, and overall life satisfaction among Australians. Conducted acros...

item.title: Detailed Guide to Brookhurst International School: Fees, Scholarships, Campuses, and Admissions
item.description: Brookhurst International School is a private co-educational institution in Kenya that follows the British National Curriculum. The school operates two main campuses: the Kiserian campus, which offers ...

item.title: Ogun State celebrates Pa Reuben Fasoranti on his 100th birthday
item.description: Ogun State Government don join Nigerians from all corners of di country dey celebrate Pa Reuben Famuyide Fasoranti, di Afenifere leader, as e don reach 100 years. Governor Dapo Abiodun personally sign...

item.title: MG ZS Pro and MG 3 Tested on Western Cape Roads
item.description: MG, the Chinese-British car brand, has been steadily expanding its presence in South Africa since officially returning in 2025. The brand invited journalists for a road trip across the Western Cape to...

item.title: UK job market expected to soften in 2026 amid global conflict and rising costs
item.description: A new report from the Item Club warns that the UK is projected to lose 163,000 jobs in 2026, with lower-income regions set to be most affected by the economic consequences of the Iran war. South Wales...

item.title: Marc Marquez undergoes double surgery after Le Mans crash, out of Catalan GP
item.description: Ducati rider and reigning MotoGP champion Marc Marquez underwent two surgeries in Madrid after a highside crash during the French Grand Prix sprint at Le Mans. The incident left him with a fractured f...
